description: DayPage v3 体验升级 - 从 Demo 到产品：可信任地基（编译反馈+语音重做）→ 流程精简 → 视觉升级（暖白系） → On This Day 懂我时刻 → 首次体验

userStories.title: VoiceService 移除实时转写 - 删除 SFSpeechRecognizer 与 AVAudioEngine 相关代码
userStories.description: As a user, I want voice recording to capture my full audio reliably, so 5-second recordings do not lose the last 2 seconds like the current SFSpeechRecognizer implementation does.
acceptanceCriteria: Remove from VoiceService.swift: import Speech, speechRecognizer/recognitionRequest/recognitionTask/audioEngine private properties (line 74-78)
Remove startLiveTranscription() and stopLiveTranscription() methods entirely (line 156-217)
Remove @Published liveTranscript property (line 64)
Remove startLiveTranscription call from startRecording() (line 153)
Remove stopLiveTranscription calls from pauseRecording/resumeRecording/cancelRecording/reset/stopAndTranscribe
Simplify stopAndTranscribe() to always call transcribeAudio(at: fileURL) - remove capturedLiveTranscript branch (line 264-276)
Remove liveTranscript reset from startRecording/cancelRecording/reset
Remove NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription from Info.plist
VoiceService.swift file shrinks by approximately 80 lines
Typecheck passes
Xcode build succeeds with no Speech framework references

userStories.title: VoiceRecordingView 移除实时转写 UI - 只保留波形 + 时长
userStories.description: As a user, the recording overlay should show only the waveform and timer without a live transcript area that was the source of the lost-last-seconds bug.
acceptanceCriteria: Remove liveTranscriptView component and all references to viewModel/VoiceService.liveTranscript from VoiceRecordingView.swift
Recording screen shows: waveform visualization + elapsed time + pause/stop/cancel buttons only
Bottom text reads '停止后自动转写' (or similar) instead of live transcript
No layout regressions - waveform takes the vertical space previously used by transcript
Typecheck passes
Verify in iOS Simulator: start recording, no live transcript appears, stop -> Whisper result appears in memo

userStories.title: 引入 DayPageLogger 统一错误日志系统
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a central logger writing to vault/logs/app.log so I can diagnose errors instead of losing them to try? swallowing.
acceptanceCriteria: Create DayPage/Services/DayPageLogger.swift with @MainActor final class singleton
Public API: DayPageLogger.shared.error(_ message: String, file: String = #file, line: Int = #line), .warn(), .info()
Writes to vault/logs/app.log with ISO8601 timestamp + level + source file:line + message
Rotates log file when it exceeds 1MB (rename to app.log.old, start fresh)
Thread-safe: uses a serial DispatchQueue for writes
Register file in Xcode project (project.pbxproj entries)
Replace try? in CompilationService.swift:162 (appendLog) with do/catch calling logger.error
Replace try? in CompilationService.swift:397 (updateHotCache) with do/catch calling logger.error
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: 创建 AppBanner 组件 - 三态横幅（进行中/成功/错误）
userStories.description: As a user, I want a top banner that shows operation progress and outcomes so I never see silent failures again.
acceptanceCriteria: Create DayPage/Features/Shared/AppBanner.swift with enum BannerKind: .progress, .success, .error, .info
Struct AppBannerModel: id UUID, kind, title String, subtitle String?, primaryAction (label, handler)?, secondaryAction?, autoDismiss Bool
SwiftUI view AppBanner renders: leading icon (progress spinner / checkmark / exclamation), title line, optional subtitle, trailing action button(s), close X

Colors: progress = warningSoft bg + warning accent (placeholder hex #F8ECD6 / #A66A00 until US-017 defines tokens), success = successSoft/success, error = errorSoft/error, info = surfaceSunken/onBackgroundMuted
Auto-dismiss timer (3s for success, none for others) when autoDismiss = true
Animations: slide down from top + fade in; slide up + fade out on dismiss (spring response 0.4, dampingFraction 0.85)
Create BannerCenter @MainActor ObservableObject singleton with @Published currentBanner: AppBannerModel?, show(_ model), dismiss()
Only one banner visible at a time; show() replaces currentBanner
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: RootView / TodayView 挂载 BannerCenter
userStories.description: As a user, I want banners to appear at the top of Today View without blocking scrolling or input.
acceptanceCriteria: Inject BannerCenter.shared into RootView as @StateObject
Overlay AppBanner(model:) at the top of TodayView when BannerCenter.currentBanner != nil
Banner floats above the memo list; list remains scrollable and input bar remains usable
Banner respects safe area top inset
Banner X button dismisses via BannerCenter.dismiss()
Typecheck passes
Verify in iOS Simulator: manually call BannerCenter.shared.show(.init(kind: .progress, title: 'Test')) from a debug button - banner appears, does not block scrolling

userStories.title: CompilationService 添加网络预检 + 前台自动重试
userStories.description: As a user, I want compilation to handle flaky network automatically - preflight offline detection, retry twice on network errors, before showing a red error.
acceptanceCriteria: Import Network framework; add NetworkMonitor singleton @MainActor that observes NWPathMonitor and publishes isOnline Bool
In CompilationService.compile(): before calling DashScope, check NetworkMonitor.shared.isOnline; if offline, throw CompilationError.offline (new case)
Add CompilationError.offline case with errorDescription '当前离线，已加入队列，联网后自动编译'
Wrap callDashScope in retry loop: maxAttempts = 3, backoff = 2s, 6s
Retry on: URLError.timedOut, URLError.notConnectedToInternet, URLError.networkConnectionLost, HTTP 429, HTTP 5xx, CompilationError.networkError
Do NOT retry on: 401, 403, 400, parseError
Each retry calls an optional onRetry: (attempt: Int, maxAttempts: Int) -> Void callback so callers can update UI
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: TodayViewModel 接入编译 Banner 生命周期
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see progress, retry, success, and failure feedback for every manual compile via the top banner.
acceptanceCriteria: In TodayViewModel.triggerCompilation() (or equivalent method): before await, call BannerCenter.shared.show progress banner with title '正在编译你的今天...'
Start Date and after 5s update banner subtitle to '网络较慢，请稍候...' (if still compiling)
After 15s, banner shows secondary action '取消' that cancels the Task
Pass onRetry callback to compile(): update banner subtitle to '正在重试（\(attempt)/\(maxAttempts)）...'
On offline error: show info banner '当前离线，已加入队列' with autoDismiss=true
On final success: show success banner '今日 Daily Page 已生成' with autoDismiss=true, tap -> navigate to Daily Page
On missingApiKey: show error banner 'DashScope API Key 未配置' with primaryAction '前往设置' -> Settings
On apiError(401): show error banner 'API Key 无效或已过期' with primaryAction '前往设置'
On parseError: show error banner 'AI 返回格式异常' with primaryAction '查看日志'
On final networkError after retries: show error banner '编译失败：网络不稳定' with primaryAction '立即重试', secondaryAction '稍后自动重试'
Typecheck passes
Verify in iOS Simulator: trigger compile with airplane mode on -> info banner appears; turn on network, trigger compile with invalid API key -> error banner with 前往设置 action

userStories.title: API Key 启动健康检查 Banner
userStories.description: As a user, I want to know immediately at app launch if any API key is missing so I am not surprised later.
acceptanceCriteria: On DayPageApp.onAppear, check Secrets.dashScopeApiKey, Secrets.openAIWhisperApiKey, Secrets.openWeatherApiKey
If any is empty, BannerCenter.shared.show info banner: title 'N 个功能未配置', subtitle listing missing keys, primaryAction '前往设置' navigating to Settings
Banner does NOT auto-dismiss; user must X it or tap action
If all configured: no banner
Typecheck passes
Verify in iOS Simulator: clear one key in GeneratedSecrets, relaunch -> banner appears

userStories.title: VoiceAttachmentQueue - 离线/失败语音转写队列
userStories.description: As a user, I want offline voice recordings to be saved and automatically transcribed when I am back online, without losing any audio.
acceptanceCriteria: Create DayPage/Services/VoiceAttachmentQueue.swift @MainActor singleton
Queue persists as vault/drafts/voice_queue.json: [{ id, audioPath, createdAt, memoDate, attempts, lastError? }]
enqueue(audioPath: String, memoDate: Date) adds entry

processQueue() iterates: for each entry, if NetworkMonitor.isOnline, call Whisper (reuse VoiceService transcribeAudio); on success write transcript back to the memo and remove entry; on failure increment attempts and record lastError
Max 3 attempts per entry; after 3 attempts move to 'failed' section (still in file but skipped)
Observe NetworkMonitor: call processQueue() when transitioning from offline to online
Observe UIApplication.didBecomeActiveNotification: call processQueue()
VoiceService.stopAndTranscribe: if transcribeAudio returns nil AND NetworkMonitor.isOnline is false, enqueue the audio instead of leaving transcript nil silently
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: 离线语音待转写 Banner + memo 占位 UI
userStories.description: As a user, I want visual feedback that my offline recordings are queued and being processed.
acceptanceCriteria: When VoiceAttachmentQueue count > 0, TodayView shows info banner '你有 N 条语音待转写' (auto-dismiss false)
MemoCardView for a voice memo with nil transcript and in-queue state shows '转写中...' placeholder with a small spinner
When transcript is written back, MemoCardView updates reactively to show final text
Banner dismisses automatically when queue empties
Typecheck passes
Verify in iOS Simulator: record voice offline -> banner + placeholder appears, go online -> transcript fills in, banner disappears

userStories.title: 清扫 try? 吞异常 - 替换为 DayPageLogger
userStories.description: As a developer, I want errors logged instead of silently dropped, except for truly ignorable cases.
acceptanceCriteria: Grep for 'try?' across DayPage/Services, DayPage/Models, DayPage/Features
For each occurrence except temp-file cleanup, replace with do { try ... } catch { DayPageLogger.shared.error(...) }
Allowlist (keep try?): cleanup of temporary files after successful atomic rename, AVAudioSession.setActive(false) shutdown
Count of try? occurrences reduced by at least 50%
New do/catch blocks preserve original control flow (same fallback values)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: 输入栏瘦身 - 单输入框 + 发送键 + 键盘上方 QuickBar
userStories.description: As a user, I want the input bar to feel calm - one text field, one send button - with secondary actions tucked into a keyboard accessory bar.
acceptanceCriteria: Remove inline microphone/camera/photo/file/location buttons from InputBarView main row
Input bar main row shows only: expandable TextField + send button
Send button appearance: inactive gray when text empty, accent when text present
Above the system keyboard, add a QuickBar (UIToolbar via .toolbar ToolbarItemGroup(placement: .keyboard) or custom accessoryView) with icons: 🎙️ 相机 相册 📎 位置
Each QuickBar icon invokes the existing TodayViewModel handler (startVoiceRecording / startPhotoPicker / startFilePicker / attachCurrentLocation)
QuickBar disappears when keyboard dismisses
Typecheck passes
Verify in iOS Simulator: tap input field -> keyboard appears with QuickBar above -> tap photo icon -> photo picker opens

userStories.title: 长按发送键进入语音录制
userStories.description: As a user, I want holding the send button to start voice recording (like iMessage) so voice is the primary mode, no modal tap required.
acceptanceCriteria: Add LongPressGesture(minimumDuration: 0.3) to send button
When recognized: haptic impact .light, present VoiceRecordingView as a half-sheet (.presentationDetents([.medium])) so the memo list below stays visible (dim overlay)
VoiceRecordingView instructs: '松手发送 / 上滑取消'
Release finger -> if not canceled, call stopAndTranscribe and append memo
Swipe up 80pt inside the sheet -> cancelRecording
Short tap on send button (no long press) keeps existing send-text behavior
Typecheck passes
Verify in iOS Simulator: long press send -> half sheet with waveform; release -> memo appears; long press + swipe up -> canceled

userStories.title: 附件 Chip 行 - 发送前 inline 预览
userStories.description: As a user, I want pending attachments to appear as small chips above the input field instead of oversized preview cards.
acceptanceCriteria: Replace PendingAttachment preview cards with an HStack of chips above the TextField
Chip layout: type icon (16pt) + label (photo filename / file name / location name / voice duration, truncated to 20 chars) + close X
Chip height <= 32pt, spacing 8pt, horizontal scroll if too many
Tap X removes the pending attachment
On send, chips and text combine into one memo as before
Typecheck passes
Verify in iOS Simulator: attach photo + location -> two chips appear; remove photo -> one chip left; send -> memo created with remaining attachment

userStories.title: 统一 DayDetailView - Archive 日期点击统一路由
userStories.description: As a user, I want every date I tap in Archive to land on one consistent detail view with a tab switch between Daily Page and raw memos.
acceptanceCriteria: Create DayPage/Features/Archive/DayDetailView.swift accepting a Date
Top segment control: [Daily Page] [原始 Memo]
Daily Page tab: reuse DailyPageView if compiled; if not compiled, show a CTA card '这一天还没编译' with a '立即编译' button
原始 Memo tab: reuse Today memo card components to render memos for that date
Empty date: single centered message '这一天没有记录' + link to nearest recorded date
Archive calendar AND list view both route to DayDetailView on date tap (remove the old conditional branching)
Back button preserves Archive scroll position
Typecheck passes
Verify in iOS Simulator: tap compiled date -> Daily Page tab; tap uncompiled date with memos -> 原始 Memo tab shows memos; tap empty date -> empty message

userStories.title: Settings 页骨架与重构 - 分区 + API Key 状态
userStories.description: As a user, I want a Settings page with clear sections for API keys, permissions, appearance, data, about - with test-connection buttons for each API key.
acceptanceCriteria: Expand DayPage/Features/Settings/SettingsView.swift (create if missing) with sections: API Keys, 权限, 外观, 数据, 关于
API Keys section rows: DashScope, OpenAI Whisper, OpenWeather - each row shows: name, masked key preview (last 4 chars) or '未配置' red badge, '测试连接' button
测试连接 button invokes a minimal ping (DashScope: chat with 1 token, Whisper: GET /v1/models, OpenWeather: current weather for 0,0) and toasts success/failure
权限 section: microphone, location, notifications - show current authorization status, tap row opens iOS Settings deep link
外观 section: placeholder for future dark mode toggle (disabled, labeled '即将推出')
数据 section: '清除示例数据' button (wired in US-028), '导出全部 Markdown' button (link to existing export), vault 大小读取
关于 section: version (Bundle.main), build, GitHub link
Settings reachable from hamburger/settings icon in Today header
Typecheck passes
Verify in iOS Simulator: navigate to Settings -> all 5 sections render; tap 测试连接 -> toast appears

userStories.title: DSColor 暖白 token 系统升级
userStories.description: As a designer, I want a comprehensive warm-white color token system replacing the current stark black-on-white palette.
acceptanceCriteria: Update DayPage/DesignSystem/Colors.swift (or DSColor.swift) with new tokens: background #FAF8F6, surface #FFFFFF, surfaceElevated #FFFFFF + shadow, surfaceSunken #F3F0EB, onBackground #2B2822, onBackgroundMuted #6B6560, onBackgroundSubtle #A39F99, accent #5D3000, accentHover #7A3F00, accentSoft #F5EDE3, accentBorder #E8DCCA, success #4C7A3F, successSoft #EBF3E5, warning #A66A00, warningSoft #F8ECD6, error #A23A2E, errorSoft #F5E1DC, heatmapEmpty #F0EBE3, heatmapLow #E6D9C3, heatmapMid #C9A677, heatmapHigh #5D3000, borderSubtle #EDE8DF, borderDefault #D6CEC0
Provide a surfaceElevatedShadow ViewModifier (offset 0,1, radius 3, opacity 0.04)
Mark old tokens @available(*, deprecated, message: 'Use <new token>') if they overlap
Set UIUserInterfaceStyle = Light in Info.plist (lock light mode for v3)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: 替换全部硬编码颜色 - 走 DSColor token
userStories.description: As a user, I want every screen to use the new warm-white palette with no leftover stark black/white hardcodings.
acceptanceCriteria: Grep hardcoded colors: Color\(hex:|\.black|\.white|Color\(red:|UIColor\( - replace with DSColor tokens across DayPage/Features and DayPage/App and DayPage/DesignSystem
Focus on ArchiveView.swift heatmap hex values (lines 61-64) -> DSColor.heatmap*
Today background -> DSColor.background; cards -> DSColor.surface with surfaceElevatedShadow modifier
Text primary -> DSColor.onBackground; metadata -> DSColor.onBackgroundMuted; placeholder -> DSColor.onBackgroundSubtle
AppBanner (US-004) re-reads tokens from DSColor now that they are defined
After change: grep count of Color(hex:|\.black|\.white in DayPage/Features and DayPage/App <= 0 (excluding DSColor.swift definitions)
Typecheck passes
Verify in iOS Simulator: screenshot Today and Daily Page - background is warm cream, text is dark warm brown (not pure black), cards have subtle lift

userStories.title: Typography 扩展到 5 级层级
userStories.description: As a user, I want typography to have clear visual hierarchy - Display / H1 / H2 / Body / Caption / Label - instead of only 2 levels.
acceptanceCriteria: Update DayPage/App/Typography.swift (or DSType.swift) with new styles: displayLG 56/Space Grotesk Bold/letterSpacing +0.04em, h1 32/Space Grotesk Bold, h2 22/Space Grotesk SemiBold, body 16/Inter Regular/lineHeight 1.6, caption 13/Inter Medium, label 11/Space Grotesk Bold uppercase
Provide SwiftUI modifiers: .displayLG(), .h1(), .h2(), .body(), .caption(), .label()
Replace the 3 hardcoded .custom("...") usages: VoiceRecordingView.swift:~129, InputBarView.swift:~102, plus any grep-found extras
Update DailyPageView header to use displayLG for date, h1 for compiled title, h2 for section titles
Update MemoCardView body text to use body modifier, metadata to caption, tag labels to label
Typecheck passes
Verify in iOS Simulator: open Daily Page - date, title, section header, body, metadata are visually distinct in 4-5 steps

userStories.title: 留白与圆角系统化 - 卡片 padding 20pt / 圆角 12pt / 微阴影
userStories.description: As a user, I want cards to breathe - generous padding, gentle rounded corners, subtle elevation - instead of cramped zero-radius rectangles.
acceptanceCriteria: DayPage/DesignSystem/Spacing.swift: add constants cardInner 20, cardGap 16, sectionGap 24, radiusCard 12, radiusSmall 8
MemoCardView: padding 20pt, corner radius 12pt, surfaceElevatedShadow modifier applied
Daily Page entry cards: same spacing/radius
Archive list rows: radius 12pt between rows, gap 16pt
Input bar container: radius 12pt
AppBanner: radius 12pt
NO zero-radius rectangles remain in user-visible cards (heatmap cells are allowed)
Typecheck passes
Verify in iOS Simulator: Today/Archive/Daily Page screenshots show clearly separated, rounded cards with subtle shadows

userStories.title: 时间表达情绪化 - RelativeTimeFormatter 与全局替换
userStories.description: As a user, I want dates to feel human - TODAY / YESTERDAY / 3 DAYS AGO - instead of cold timestamps like 2026.04.17 // 14:23.
acceptanceCriteria: Create DayPage/Utilities/RelativeTimeFormatter.swift with: static func relative(_ date: Date, now: Date = .now) -> String returning 'TODAY · 14:23' / 'YESTERDAY · 14:23' / '3 DAYS AGO · APR 14' / 'APR 14, 2026'
Thresholds: today (same day in current calendar), yesterday (-1 day), within 7 days (N DAYS AGO + MMM d), older (MMM d, yyyy)
All-caps labels; numeric time in HH:mm
Replace timestamp strings in: TodayView.swift line ~319 memo timestamp, MemoCardView, DailyPageEntryCard, Archive list row date labels, EntityPageView related-entries
Daily Page header uses a variant: top line 'APRIL 14' displayLG, subtitle 'Sunday, 2026' caption
Typecheck passes
Verify in iOS Simulator: memos from today show TODAY · HH:mm; make a memo, observe Archive list shows TODAY for today, YESTERDAY for yesterday if any

userStories.title: 微交互 - 卡片按压 / 展开动画 / 触觉反馈
userStories.description: As a user, I want the app to feel alive - cards respond to touch, transitions are springy, key actions give haptic feedback.
acceptanceCriteria: Create DayPage/DesignSystem/Interactions.swift with PressableCardModifier: onPress scaleEffect 0.98, overlay black opacity 0.04, haptic .light impact on press down
Apply PressableCardModifier to: MemoCardView root, DailyPageEntryCard root, Archive list row
Replace existing ad-hoc animations: use .animation(.spring(response: 0.4, dampingFraction: 0.8), value:) on expand/collapse in MemoCardView
Send memo action: UIImpactFeedbackGenerator(style: .soft) on successful send; new memo card animates in with .transition(.move(edge: .bottom).combined(with: .opacity))
Compile success: UINotificationFeedbackGenerator().notificationOccurred(.success)
Compile failure: .error notification haptic
Typecheck passes
Verify in iOS Simulator (haptics only vibrate on device, but animations are visible): press a memo card - visibly scales to 98% and back; send a memo - new card slides in

userStories.title: 空状态重做 - Today / Archive / Graph 三处插图 + CTA
userStories.description: As a first-time user, I want empty states to guide me with illustrations and CTA chips instead of bare text.
acceptanceCriteria: Create SVG or SF Symbol composition empty-state illustrations (simple line art, single accent color) for: Today (feather/pen), Archive (calendar), Graph (network nodes)
Today empty: illustration + '记下今天的第一个观察' h2 + 3 tappable chips '今天天气如何' / '现在在哪' / '在想什么' that auto-fill the input field
Archive empty: illustration + '还没有 Daily Page' caption + '去记几条试试' link to Today
Graph empty: illustration + '记录更多，你的知识网络会自动生成' caption
Replace TodayView.swift lines ~147-151 bare-text empty state
Chip tap fills TextField and focuses it (does not auto-send)
Typecheck passes
Verify in iOS Simulator: delete all memos in vault/raw, relaunch - Today empty state shows illustration + 3 chips; tap a chip - input field fills in

userStories.title: OnThisDayIndex - 历史同日索引服务
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a fast way to look up prior memos for the same month/day, so On This Day can fire without scanning vault every launch.
acceptanceCriteria: Create DayPage/Services/OnThisDayIndex.swift @MainActor singleton
On app launch (background Task), scan vault/raw/*.md and build index: [MMDD: [year: { filePath, memoCount, longestMemoPreview (120 chars) }]]
Persist index to vault/wiki/index.json
Public API: candidate(for date: Date) -> OnThisDayEntry? that returns: prefer -365d, else -180d, else -730d (two years); nil if none have memos
OnThisDayEntry struct: originalDate Date, yearsAgo Int (1/2) or daysAgo Int (180), preview String, filePath String
rebuildIndex() after each successful compilation (CompilationService hook)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: OnThisDayCard - UI 卡片与点击跳转
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see a subtle 'On This Day · 1 year ago' card above the Today list when I have matching history.
acceptanceCriteria: Create DayPage/Features/Today/OnThisDayCard.swift taking an OnThisDayEntry
Layout: top label 'ON THIS DAY · 1 YEAR AGO' (label style, accent color), body preview (body style, 2 lines truncated), bottom right '翻开那天 →' link
Card style: accentSoft background (#F5EDE3), accentBorder, radius 12pt, padding 20pt
Top-right small X to dismiss for today (stores dismissed date in UserDefaults key onThisDayDismissedDate)
Tap card body -> navigate to DayDetailView for originalDate
Typecheck passes
Verify in iOS Simulator: inject a fake 2025-04-17 file in vault/raw, relaunch - card appears at top of Today; tap -> jumps to that date's detail

userStories.title: OnThisDayScheduler - 时区感知定时触发
userStories.description: As a user, I want On This Day to refresh once per day at my local midnight (or a user-chosen time), respecting timezone changes when I travel.
acceptanceCriteria: Create DayPage/Services/OnThisDayScheduler.swift @MainActor singleton
Reads UserDefaults key onThisDayRefreshHour (Int, default 0 = midnight)

Public API: shouldShowToday() -> OnThisDayEntry? returning OnThisDayIndex.candidate only if (a) not dismissed for today's date AND (b) currentDate >= nextFireAt stored in UserDefaults OR (c) user just hit force-refresh
markShown() sets nextFireAt = next day at refreshHour using Calendar.current in TimeZone.current
forceRefresh() ignores nextFireAt (for manual long-press trigger), always returns candidate
Observe UIApplication.significantTimeChangeNotification: recompute nextFireAt
Observe UIApplication.didBecomeActiveNotification: if shouldShowToday() non-nil, publish to TodayViewModel
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Today 大日期长按手动触发 + Settings 配置入口
userStories.description: As a user, I want a hidden manual gesture (long-press the big date) to resummon On This Day, and a Settings entry to configure auto-refresh time.
acceptanceCriteria: In TodayView, attach .onLongPressGesture(minimumDuration: 1.5) to the large date Text at the top
On recognition: haptic .medium impact; call OnThisDayScheduler.forceRefresh()
If returns entry: display OnThisDayCard (reuse same UI); if returns nil: haptic .warning notification, NO visual indicator (silent no-op, preserving hidden nature)
NO tooltip, underline, icon, accessibility hint that reveals the gesture
Settings > 外观 section adds 'On This Day' row with: Picker for 刷新时间 (午夜 00:00 default / 清晨 06:00 / 上午 09:00 / 关闭), Toggle for 启用手动长按触发 (default on)
When 关闭 selected: OnThisDayScheduler.shouldShowToday always returns nil; long press also returns nil
Typecheck passes
Verify in iOS Simulator: long-press large date - card appears (if history exists) or nothing happens silently; go to Settings, change 刷新时间, verify UserDefaults updated

userStories.title: 首次启动引导 - 3 屏 Onboarding
userStories.description: As a first-time user, I want a 3-screen introduction that explains the value, requests permissions, and lets me configure API keys (or skip).
acceptanceCriteria: Create DayPage/Features/Onboarding/OnboardingView.swift with 3 pages via TabView(selection:) and .page style
Page 1: welcome illustration + 'DayPage' title + subtitle 'Dump today, let AI compile tomorrow' + Next button

Page 2: three permission cards (microphone / location / notifications), each with purpose text + Grant button that triggers the real iOS permission prompt; status updates to granted/denied; Next button always enabled (can skip)
Page 3: three API key input fields (DashScope, OpenAI, OpenWeather) with 'Paste from clipboard' button; Get Started button
On completion, UserDefaults key hasOnboarded = true
DayPageApp gates RootView on hasOnboarded; if false, show OnboardingView as root
Onboarding respects US-017 DSColor tokens (warm-white system)
Typecheck passes
Verify in iOS Simulator: delete app data (clear UserDefaults) and relaunch - onboarding shows; complete it - lands on Today

userStories.title: 示例 memo 预置 + Settings 清除按钮
userStories.description: As a first-time user, I want 3 sample memos (text / voice-with-transcript / photo) dated yesterday so I see the app populated with realistic content.
acceptanceCriteria: On first launch after onboarding completion (UserDefaults flag hasSeededSamples default false), seed 3 memos in vault/raw/{yesterday}.md: (1) text memo '在咖啡店角落的位置，窗外在下小雨。'; (2) voice memo with sample audio file bundled in app + pre-set transcript; (3) photo memo with a bundled sample jpg and EXIF
Bundle sample assets in DayPage/Resources/Samples/: sample_voice.m4a, sample_photo.jpg
Set hasSeededSamples = true after successful seeding
Settings > 数据 > '清除示例数据' button: removes the seeded memos (only if they still match their original content, to avoid clobbering user edits), resets hasSeededSamples
Typecheck passes
Verify in iOS Simulator: fresh install + onboarding - Today shows today empty, Archive shows yesterday has 3 memos; tap 清除示例数据 in Settings - those 3 memos removed
